overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic spaceport terminal in a video game. The player approaches the International and Translunar Spaceport entrance, passes through an upper concourse, and turns to overlook a vast multi-level atrium with digital advertisements and escalators.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceport check-in corridor with queue barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper concourse toward the spaceport entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'INTERNATIONAL AND TRANSLUNAR SPACEPORT'
row of dark check-in counters with red lighting
red rope barriers guiding passenger queue lines
multi-level escalator with glass sides and metal railings
transparent safety railing along the walkway edge
yellow and black diagonal striped floor markings near entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper concourse of a futuristic spaceport, approaching the International and Translunar Spaceport entrance. The corridor features check-in kiosks on the left with queued passengers, hazard-striped floor markings, and an escalator structure visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level concourse transitioning to shopping district

events.description: pedestrian in green overalls walks past camera from left to right
passing the spaceport entrance area and approaching the shopping zone

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the spaceport entrance queue toward the shopping area

notable_agents.action: woman in green overalls walking briskly past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screen displaying 'AVANTE' brand

segments.scene_description: Passing the spaceport entrance where passengers queue at check-in counters. A woman in green overalls walks past the camera from left to right. The corridor continues toward a shopping area, with digital billboards becoming visible on the upper right walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level terminal atrium with exit gates and escalators

events.description: turning right to reveal the expansive main terminal atrium with multiple floors and exit gates

agents.ego_description: turning to overlook the main atrium and observe the lower terminal level

notable_agents.action: person walking across the lower terminal floor toward the exit gates

entered.detail: illuminated exit sign above the terminal gates
open multi-level space with glass railings and multiple escalators
digital advertisement reading 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH'
escalators descending to the terminal floor viewed from above

segments.scene_description: Turning right to reveal a vast, multi-level terminal atrium. The camera overlooks escalators descending to the lower level where exit gates are visible. Large digital billboards display advertisements overhead, and a few pedestrians walk across the distant terminal floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile transit corridor that gradually opens into a vast, multi-level spaceport atrium. It begins by moving along an upper concourse past check-in kiosks and hazard-striped floor markings, with an escalator structure visible to the right. As the camera passes the International and Translunar Spaceport entrance, a woman in green overalls crosses the path while digital billboards begin to emerge on the upper walls. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, expanding from the narrow corridor to reveal a massive terminal void. Finally, the view overlooks descending escalators and distant exit gates, with large overhead advertisements dominating the scale of the open architectural space.
